title: Low-literacy pictogram set (openly-licensed or original)
context: Low-literacy pictograms support WASH how-to comprehension for people who cannot read the text. The license must be clean: either original artwork or openly-licensed sets (e.g., CC0 or CC-BY) that are compatible with CC-BY-4.0 output. No third-party logos, emblems, or trademarks may be reproduced. No identifiable people depicted without documented consent (default: avoid identifiable individuals). This is a design-spec deliverable that defines the pictogram approach and specifies or produces the asset set.
objective: Define the low-literacy pictogram approach for wash-guides: identify or commission a license-clean set of pictograms covering the core WASH how-to topics (handwashing steps, water treatment, latrine use, etc.), verify license compatibility with CC-BY-4.0 output, and produce or reference the asset set with provenance documented.
acceptanceCriteria: Pictogram approach is documented: whether using an existing openly-licensed set (with specific license verified), commissioning original artwork, or a hybrid; license compatibility with CC-BY-4.0 output is confirmed and recorded
No third-party logos, emblems, or trademarks are included; no identifiable individuals are depicted
Pictograms cover at minimum the core WASH how-to topics: handwashing technique, water boiling, safe water storage, latrine use, and safe excreta disposal
Provenance of each asset (source, license, retrieval/commission date) is recorded in the repo
Design spec or asset set reviewed and approved by a maintainer distinct from the author
output: A committed design specification or pictogram asset set covering core WASH topics, with verified license compatibility and documented provenance for each asset.
